name_en: Medium Size 35×27×14cm Compared to the large size, this medium size is more refined and is especially suitable for petite frames; it is great for styling! What you see is what you get! I have provided high-definition close-ups of every detail, including the 3D print effect and the fullness of the bag shape. If you have friends who understand bags, you can ask them. The craftsmanship of this level is very rare to see! It can be used as a diaper bag, commuter bag, or travel bag. It has good load-bearing capacity, so you don't need to worry about shoulder pain from carrying it for a long time. Buy with confidence!
